Class WheatFlour

java.lang.Object
entity.base.BaseItem
entity.base.BaseIngredient
entity.ingredients.WheatFlour
All Implemented Interfaces:
Mixable, Waterable
public class WheatFlour extends BaseIngredient implements Waterable, Mixable
Represents wheat flour ingredient.
